name: CEO-Bench: Can Agents Play the Long Game?
summary: arXiv:2606.18543v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Language model agents are becoming proficient executors at isolated, short-horizon tasks such as software engineering and customer service. Yet r...
description: arXiv:2606.18543v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Language model agents are becoming proficient executors at isolated, short-horizon tasks such as software engineering and customer service. Yet real-world challenges require a combination of sophisticated skills that remain largely untested in agents: (1) navigating long horizons amid uncertainty; (2) acquiring information in noisy environment...
author: Haozhe Chen, Karthik Narasimhan, Zhuang Liu
